'''zholajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:labelled|labelled]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-l-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labelled|labelled]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zholajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zholajithi|zholajithi]] || [[word:zholajiji|zholajiji]] || [[word:zholajishi|zholajishi]] || [[word:zholajiki|zholajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zholajuthuthu|zholajuthuthu]] || [[word:zholajujuju|zholajujuju]] || [[word:zholajushushu|zholajushushu]] || [[word:zholajukuku|zholajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zholajuthu|zholajuthu]] || [[word:zholajuju|zholajuju]] || [[word:zholajushu|zholajushu]] || [[word:zholajuku|zholajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zholajufthuf|zholajufthuf]] || [[word:zholajufjuf|zholajufjuf]] || [[word:zholajufshuf|zholajufshuf]] || [[word:zholajufkuf|zholajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zholajethe|zholajethe]] || [[word:zholajeje|zholajeje]] || [[word:zholajeshe|zholajeshe]] || [[word:zholajeke|zholajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zholajothotho|zholajothotho]] || [[word:zholajojojo|zholajojojo]] || [[word:zholajoshosho|zholajoshosho]] || [[word:zholajokoko|zholajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zholajotho|zholajotho]] || [[word:zholajojo|zholajojo]] || [[word:zholajosho|zholajosho]] || [[word:zholajoko|zholajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zholajofthof|zholajofthof]] || [[word:zholajofjof|zholajofjof]] || [[word:zholajofshof|zholajofshof]] || [[word:zholajofkof|zholajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zholajĂŻfthĂŻf|zholajĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zholajĂŻfjĂŻf|zholajĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zholajĂŻfshĂŻf|zholajĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zholajĂŻfkĂŻf|zholajĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zholajĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zholajĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zholajĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zholajĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zholajĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zholajĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zholajĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zholajĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zholajĂŻfthĂŻf|zholajĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zholajĂŻfjĂŻf|zholajĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zholajĂŻfshĂŻf|zholajĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zholajĂŻfkĂŻf|zholajĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zholajĂŻfthĂŻf|zholajĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zholajĂŻfjĂŻf|zholajĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zholajĂŻfshĂŻf|zholajĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zholajĂŻfkĂŻf|zholajĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zholajĂŠthĂŠ|zholajĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zholajĂŠjĂŠ|zholajĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zholajĂŠshĂŠ|zholajĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zholajĂŠkĂŠ|zholajĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zholajathatha|zholajathatha]] || [[word:zholajajaja|zholajajaja]] || [[word:zholajashasha|zholajashasha]] || [[word:zholajakaka|zholajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zholajatha|zholajatha]] || [[word:zholajaja|zholajaja]] || [[word:zholajasha|zholajasha]] || [[word:zholajaka|zholajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zholajafthaf|zholajafthaf]] || [[word:zholajafjaf|zholajafjaf]] || [[word:zholajafshaf|zholajafshaf]] || [[word:zholajafkaf|zholajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zholajasha|zholajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zholajshĂ«sha|zholajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zholajrosha|zholajrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zholajmusha|zholajmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zholajyasha|zholajyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozholajnkshĂ«sha|gozholajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozholajnkrosha|gozholajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozholajnkmusha|gozholajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozholajnkyasha|gozholajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zholalajasha|zholalajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zholalajshĂ«sha|zholalajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zholalajrosha|zholalajrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zholalajmusha|zholalajmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zholalajyasha|zholalajyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozholalajnkshĂ«sha|gozholalajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozholalajnkrosha|gozholalajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozholalajnkmusha|gozholalajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozholalajnkyasha|gozholalajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhelĂŠjasha|zhelĂŠjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhelĂŠjshĂ«sha|zhelĂŠjshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhelĂŠjrosha|zhelĂŠjrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhelĂŠjmusha|zhelĂŠjmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhelĂŠjyasha|zhelĂŠjyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhelĂŠjnkshĂ«sha|gozhelĂŠjnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhelĂŠjnkrosha|gozhelĂŠjnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhelĂŠjnkmusha|gozhelĂŠjnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhelĂŠjnkyasha|gozhelĂŠjnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zholfajasha|zholfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zholfajshĂ«sha|zholfajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zholfajrosha|zholfajrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zholfajmusha|zholfajmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zholfajyasha|zholfajyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozholfajnkshĂ«sha|gozholfajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozholfajnkrosha|gozholfajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozholfajnkmusha|gozholfajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozholfajnkyasha|gozholfajnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|27df60f}}
